title: Dreyse Heroes
description: Dreyse Heroes Is an addon for Palladium that adds superheroes from the marvel/dc universe, with a major focus on roleplay, while attempting to be balanced/survival compatible (while being accurate to canon as much as possible).
body:
# **Dreyse Heroes (Release Version 1.0)**
Welcome to Dreyse Heroes! Originally just a data based Palladium addon, this project has evolved into a mod-addon with with custom elements designed to give you the most authentic super-powered experiences in Minecraft. 

Powers will be rolling out on a release-by-release basis, and for our massive Version 1.0 launch, you can harness the power of the ultimate Man of Steel: The Kryptonian!

**🌟 Core Features & Mechanics**
Dynamic Age Progression: Ditch the XP grinding. This mod features a custom age system where your Kryptonian gets naturally stronger day by day—no traditional stats or leveling required!

**Unpredictable Awakenings:** Powers unlock randomly every couple of in-game days to keep the early game fresh and unpredictable. You might wake up with the ability to fly, while someone else on your server unlocks heat vision first.

**True Invulnerability:** Feel the power as arrows bounce harmlessly off your chest and fire fails to burn you.
Next-Level Flight & Speed: Experience a custom flight system featuring smooth turns and precise movement control. When you're on the ground, utilize an simple click and move super speed system complete with sonic booms.

**Superhero Landings:** Fast-fly for more than 3 seconds with speed activated, and hitting the ground will trigger an epic, earth-shattering landing. Choose from 3 different variants equipped via the Palladium accessory menu (click the icon at your player's feet in the inventory).

**💥 Kryptonian Abilities**
Heat Vision & Freeze Breath: Melt ice, light campfires and candles, carve pumpkins, or just vaporize your enemies with heat vision. Freeze breath does the exact opposite!

**Rage Mode:** Hit harder, shoot devastating laser beams, and obliterate the environment while flying at super speed. You can even customize your eye glow to match your skin (wide eyes coming soon!).

**The "Superman 2025" Spin:** Hold right-click while Rage Mode and Heat Vision are active to spin like a Beyblade and unleash chaos!

**Utility Powers:** Crush coal into diamonds with your bare hands (25% chance per coal), blow enemies away with a Thunder Clap, and use X-Ray vision while sneaking.

 **🛠️ How to Obtain the Power!!**

1. **Mine:** Head down to `Y: -16` or below to hunt for rare **Kryptonite Ore**.
2. **Forge:** Craft 9 pieces of Kryptonite into a Kryptonite Block. 
3. **Synthesize:** Surround a Nether Star with 8 Kryptonite Blocks in a crafting table to forge **Platinum Kryptonite**.
4. Awaken: Right-click the Platinum Kryptonite to unlock your Kryptonian heritage!

 **🦸‍♂️ Custom 3D Suits & Cosmetics**
Suit up with high-quality, custom 3D-modeled armor including:
* Classic Superman, Jon Kent, Black Recovery Suit, Kingdom Come, and Alt Suits.
* Superboy & Supergirl Suits.
* General Zod Armor.
* *Casual Wear:* Gojo & Sukuna hoodies, various compression shirts, cargo pants, and Cartier/Dita glasses. 
*(Note: We highly recommend using JEI to check out all the specific crafting recipes for the clothing and armor plating, as we do not have a dedicated wiki yet.)

 **⚙️ Admin & Creative Commands**
Want to skip the grind for a showcase? If you have OP, use these:
Unlock Abilities: `/advancement grant @s through dreyse_heroes:kryptonian/root`
Level Up Stats: `/time add 24000` *(Note: The maximum age level is 100 days)*

**🚀 What's Coming Next?**
Stay tuned for future updates bringing  the ability to physically lift structures and entities, as well as other heroes!
